name: D-A-single-tree-basic
description: Single tree removal — one 80-foot oak, open front yard, stump not discussed

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: Thanks for calling NorthStar Tree Service. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: I have an 80-foot oak tree in my front yard that needs to be removed.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: An 80-foot oak in the front yard. Is it an emergency?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: No, it's not an emergency. It's just dead and I want it taken down before it falls.
